title: Krathong Mod
description: A Mod that adds Krathong to Minecraft
body:
# Krathong Mod
*it's pronounced "grah-TONG", not "krat-THONG" - Co9ski*


This mod adds Krathong (กระทง) for Thailand's Loy Krathong Festival! (I am a day late)

![Krathong on Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GeGW92Jb/images/3cd84d3c1f746cc0cff5a9777464f5fb2ce96b4a.png)

# Uses

You can float it on water. Light it. Put your own flower on it. And push it into a body of water!

# Recipes
WIP, for now just use `/give @s krathongmod:krathong`

# Future plans
- Add recipes for Krathong
- Add individual incense as a useable item/block and also for crafting Krathong.
- Add those floaty lamps

# Compatibility
- LambDynamicLights ✅
